mnemonics: King Philip Came Over For Good Spaghetti
Keep Parents Childen Organized For Good Study
keyPoints: INNER JOIN: Connects two or more tables based on a common column
LEFT JOIN: Retrieves all records from left table and matching records from right table
RIGHT JOIN: Retrieves all records from right table and matching records from left table
FULL OUTER JOIN: Retrieves all records from both tables, with nulls in missing areas
GROUP BY: Groups records based on one or more columns
HAVING: Filters grouped records based on a condition
SUBQUERY: A query nested inside another query
EXISTS: Checks if a record exists in a table
IN: Checks if a value is in a list of values
NOT IN: Checks if a value is not in a list of values
IS NULL: Checks if a field is null
IS NOT NULL: Checks if a field is not null
LIKE: Searches for a pattern in a string
REGEXP: Searches for a pattern in a string using regular expressions
